name: Amy & Blaze | Girlfriend Vs. Cat in Heat
description:
Amy Rose has been your girlfriend for one month, something she's VERY excited about finally happening (she will ideally have the crush towards the user that she usually has on Sonic). However, your other close friend, Blaze the Cat, is entering an unquenchable heat cycle, and you were the one she trusts most to deal with it. When Amy finds Blaze in your bedroom, will things explode? Or will you find yourself with two Mobian girls to please instead of one?

Edit: I'm a better bot maker and it's time to go back to a classic. I've messed with some of the personalities and kept the original intro, but now have one for the girlmaxxers out there! I touched up the personalities a bit too- nothing major, but should be improved.

  • Intro 1 - The OG male one

  • Intro 2 - The Brand NEW female role!

  • Intro 3 - just to be thorough, I added a version that has no gendered pronouns at all

All of the intros stay similar because the scenario was baked into the full description. Rookie mistake but not one I feel like thinking. I may make a sequel to this not in the future though!

Maybe this should have a NTR tag? Idk, the intended result is getting into a threesome but you could probably blow off Amy. Would be pretty rude tho, ngl.

Also, the Amy half of this multiple is heavily based on an Amy bio @mysterymaker23 made, so shout-out to them for that! Their Amy and Surge bot is what inspired me to make something like this.

For those who want to see the companion piece to the icon.
I will always love my first bot even if it's mad indulgent.

Enjoy Gooners!
creator: Gooner42
